brief_notes: mRNA 5'UTR optimization paper. All r² and editing efficiency values verified: HEK293T r²=0.837-0.870 vs T cells, 0.847-0.871 vs HepG2, 0.938 within replicates, 0.937 model, 0.841/0.840 cross-cell. TGFBR2 55.6% at 2 pmol, PDCD1 80.8% and 91.4%, 40%/80% dosage exceeding, 20,000 top sequences, 0.02% top fraction. 0 figures in main.tex despite being orchestrated paper (generated but not embedded), hence low figures score. 3 tables.
